prompt: Prayer for blessing stellar cartography servos after repair
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Hear now the Litany of True Stars, that calibration be sanctified.'
CONGREGATION: 'By servo and sight, the heavens yield their secrets.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Let the astrographic spirits awaken. Verify sensor-alignment. Cross-reference the star-charts against the ancient ephemeris.'
CONGREGATION: 'The Omnissiah guides our course through the void eternal.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'All readings true. Consecration complete.'

prompt: First-blessing rite for newly calibrated navigation cogitator
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Machine spirit of calculation, awaken to duty.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let no error corrupt the path-true.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Prime the logic-engines. Load the star-coordinates into blessed memory. Execute test-equations upon the void-charts.'
CONGREGATION: 'By thread and calculation, we are guided.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Navigation-spirit, your service begins. May your computations carry us home.'

prompt: Emergency cooling invocation for plasma weapon overload
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Plasma-heart! Hear the Rite of Quenching!'
CONGREGATION: 'Coolant flows! Mercy-cooling descends!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'First: Engage the primary heat-sinks. Second: Flood the weapon-coils with blessed coolant-fluid. Third: Vent excess plasma-heat to the void!'
CONGREGATION: 'The Machine Spirit yields to reason. Catastrophe averted!'

prompt: Routine blessing for astrogation calculation cycle
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Cogitator-mind, calculate our sacred path.'
CONGREGATION: 'Numbers flow like the Emperor's light.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Input stellar coordinates. Process the jump-calculations. Verify beacon-signals against the Navigators' charts.'
CONGREGATION: 'True course found. True course blessed.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Navigation-blessed. All hands stand ready.'

prompt: Daily rite for flamer promethium feed system
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Spirit of sacred flame, be fed and made ready.'
CONGREGATION: 'Promethium flows in righteous abundance.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Verify feed-line integrity. Prime the pressure-seals. Confirm fuel-spirit presence in the tank-chambers.'
CONGREGATION: 'The weapon hungers. The weapon is sated.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Flamer-blessed. Let heresy burn.'

prompt: Combat-ready diagnostic blessing for ammunition battery cells
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Power-spirits, awaken to war.'
CONGREGATION: 'Charge flows through blessed circuitry.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Scan each cell for damage-cracks. Test the discharge-rate. Confirm voltage-integrity against the holy standard.'
CONGREGATION: 'Ready. Potent. Righteous.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'All weapons may now sing. The Emperor wills it.'

prompt: Emergency fuel purification for Thunderhawk void-ascent
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Void-craft! Hear the Rite of Urgent Purity!'
CONGREGATION: 'Contamination be cast out! Fuel be made clean!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'First: Engage the filter-screens. Second: Purge sediment through the waste-vents. Third: Confirm fuel-spirit clarity in the sight-tubes.'
CONGREGATION: 'The machine-spirit is satisfied. Flight is blessed.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Ascension may commence. May the Omnissiah guide our wings.'

prompt: Maintenance ritual for electric motor holy initialization
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Motor-spirit of rotation, hear your master's voice.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let spinning commence in ordered sequence.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Grease the bearing-shrines. Confirm brush-contacts are true. Apply current-blessing to the coil-windings in slow measure.'
CONGREGATION: 'Rotation smooth. Vibration minimal. Spirit satisfied.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Motor-blessed. Ready for sacred duty.'

prompt: Consecration rite for newly activated waste recycling systems
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Spirits of refuse-transformation, be awakened to purpose.'
CONGREGATION: 'Waste becomes virtue. Refuse becomes resource.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Prime the grinder-teeth. Open the sorting-valves. Let the sacred cycle begin its eternal turning.'
CONGREGATION: 'Nothing is wasted in the Omnissiah's design.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'System-blessed. The machine hungers, and shall be fed.'

prompt: Emergency quality-control scanning during battlefield repairs
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Scanner-spirits! Reveal hidden corruption!'
CONGREGATION: 'Damage be known! Defects be named!'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Activate full-spectrum analysis. Scan the armor-weave for fractures. Read the circuit-paths for disruption.'
CONGREGATION: 'Truth revealed through blessed sensors.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'All defects catalogued. Repairs may proceed with certainty. The Emperor's will be done.'
